description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet or shelf unit with a distinctive design featuring a combination of wood and colored accents. The front face displays multiple open shelves on the left, a central white-framed compartment, and a large open section on the right with a patterned backing. The top surface is flat and wooden, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The sides and back are bordered with a blue trim, and the back panel features a decorative lattice pattern. The unit stands on four slender, angled metal legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic and elevating it off the ground.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with wood surfaces, blue trim, open shelves, and slender metal legs. Features a patterned back panel and a central white-framed compartment.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelves, a white-framed compartment, and a large open section with a patterned back.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's slim profile and the patterned back panel detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full decorative lattice pattern across the back panel and blue trim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and patterned detail seen in view 1.
